# Cache

The `Cache` class provides a simple key-value store that persists across command runs. It is useful for caching data that is expensive to fetch.

## Example

```tsx
import { Cache } from '@vicinae/api';

const cache = new Cache();

cache.set('key', 'value');
const value = cache.get('key');
cache.remove('key');
```
